---
title: "KAPZ datu analīze"
author: "Mārtiņš Mednis"
date: now
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss"
language: 
  title-block-author-single: "Autors"
  title-block-published: "Sagatavots"
format:
  email
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
#| output: false
import pyodbc
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text
from great_tables import GT, loc, style
from datetime import date

import requests
import os

# Today
today = date.today()

# ---- Connection ----
for driver in pyodbc.drivers():
    print(driver)

engine = create_engine(
    "mssql+pyodbc://ezers.bank.lv,50906/DEF"
    "?driver=ODBC+Driver+18+for+SQL+Server"
    "&TrustServerCertificate=yes"
)

# ---- Query: filter to the latesst POZ_DATUMS on the server side -----
sql = """
SELECT *
FROM DATI_GLOBUS.dbo.LB_POSITION
WHERE POZ_DATUMS = (
    SELECT MAX(POZ_DATUMS)
    FROM DATI_GLOBUS.dbo.LB_POSITION
);
"""
df = pd.read_sql(sql, engine)
print(df)

df_payload = df.to_csv(index=False)

api_key = os.getenv("OI_CLOUD_KEY")
if api_key is None:
    raise ValueError("OI_CLOUD_KEY environment variable is not set")

BASE_URL = "https://prod-oi-cloud.bank.lv/"
MODEL = "gpt-5.4-web"

headers = {
    "Authorization": f"Bearer {api_key}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
}

payload = {
    "model": MODEL,
    "messages": [
        {"role": "system", "content": "You are a helpful assistant."},
        {
            "role": "user",
            "content": f"""
Analyse this CSV data:

```csv
{df_payload}
             
"""              
        }        
    ],

    "temperature": 1
}

r = requests.post(
    BASE_URL + "api/chat/completions",
    headers=headers,
    json=payload,
    timeout=300,
    verify=False
)

data = r.json()

print(data)

if "choices" in data:
    answer = data["choices"][0]["message"]["content"]
    print(answer)
else:
    print("ERROR: API response has no 'choices'.")
```
